text:
It was not demonstrated in court.

More precisely: the Dominion v. Fox case ended before trial, so the court did not adjudicate whether Dominion rigged the election. But in the public litigation record, Fox did not establish evidence confirming that Dominion had rigged votes. Pretrial rulings instead found the fraud allegations about Dominion to be false for purposes of the defamation case.
